title: Few-Shot In-Context Learning (ICL)
description: Implement few-shot in-context learning by dynamically retrieving and injecting relevant demonstrations into the prompt. Architect dynamic example selection based on the user's query to improve model performance.
objectives: Implement few-shot in-context learning by dynamically retrieving and injecting relevant demonstrations into the prompt.
Architect dynamic example selection based on the user's query to improve model performance.
